title: VLM page_extraction response
description: The JSON a single VLM pass must return for one page image. Stored verbatim (stringified) in document_analysis_records.response; the document-level roll-up reads valor_pago/valor_liquido/valor_total out of these across pages.

papel_artefato.description: Artifact role of THIS page. Maps to document_analysis_records.artifact_role.

valor_total.description: Gross/total value on the page (existing field). Null if not found.

valor_liquido.description: Net value after retentions (ISS/INSS/IR). Null if not present on the page.

valor_pago.description: Amount actually paid (payment proofs / comprovante). Null if the page is not a payment artifact.

cnpj_emitente.description: Issuer CNPJ, format XX.XXX.XXX/XXXX-XX. Null if not found.

nome_emitente.description: Issuer company name. Null if not found.

data_emissao.description: Issue date DD/MM/YYYY. Null if not found.

numero_documento.description: Document number. Null if not found.

descricao_servico.description: Brief service/product description. Null if not found.
